data.content: Implementation complete and verified. Branch: worktree-knots-1201-managed-skill-notice (pushed to origin), commit b64e4e590384bb25a68359bcd14fa270690775df. Adds managed_skills_git::changed_tracked_paths (git porcelain check) + format_commit_notice; update_managed now appends a trailing commit-them notice listing tracked skill files left dirty by refresh. Tests cover changed/clean/non-repo branches. Verification: RUST_TEST_THREADS=1 make sanity passed (exit 0), coverage 95.05% (>=95). Review artifact = remote branch.
